rule.name: Zoom Rare Video Devices
rule.description: Detects rare video devices from Zoom logs. Actors performing Remote Employment Fraud (REF) typically use unusual device information compared to a majority of employees. Detecting this activity requires careful analysis, regular review, and a thorough understanding of the audio and video devices commonly used within your environment.
rule.query:
`zoom_index` camera=* NOT (camera=*iPhone* OR camera="*FaceTime*" OR speaker="*AirPods*" OR camera="*MacBook*" OR microphone="*MacBook Pro Microphone*")
  | rare camera limit=50
  | `zoom_rare_video_devices_filter`
false_positives: This is a hunting query meant to identify rare video devices.
